summary: Tested LexGuard AI 'Try it now' hero widget end-to-end: backend (15 pytest cases, all passed) and frontend E2E via Playwright (analyze → preview → email gate → unlock full → checklist → reset). Groq integration with llama-3.3-70b-versatile returns valid verdicts. Sample HIGH RISK policy returned score=20, 8 total flagged clauses, 2 shown in preview, 6 checklist focus areas after unlock. MongoDB persistence confirmed via leads/count increment.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: FastAPI deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') used; migrate to lifespan handler.

server.py: Raw policy_text truncated to 5000 chars is stored in MongoDB for auditability — consider PII/retention policy since the widget advertises 'Processed ephemerally. Your text is never used to train models.' This statement is misleading if text is persisted.

server.py: SYSTEM_PROMPT requires 'minimum 4 flagged_clauses if any risks exist' but test assertions only guarantee >=2 — risk of inconsistent LLM output. Consider server-side post-validation/padding.
server.py: No rate limiting on /api/analyze — each call hits Groq and could be abused.
widget.js: Email validation regex is basic; server uses EmailStr so backend is safe, but consider stronger client-side check.
widget.js: On unlock failure, error state shows generic retry that returns to 'input' losing the analysis_id (user has to re-analyze, billing Groq again). Consider 'back to preview' instead.
index.html: Claims 'never used to train models' while backend persists truncated policy_text — reconcile copy vs. storage behavior.
No DB indexes on analyses.analysis_id or leads.email — add for performance at scale.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 analysis + 1 lead with email TEST_qa@example.com (pytest) and 1 lead TEST_e2e@example.com (Playwright). Both prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_lexguard.py and exercise all endpoints (/api/, /api/analyze, /api/unlock, /api/leads/count). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_lexguard.py -v. Groq API key in backend/.env is live and working. Widget states are controlled via hidden attribute on .lg-state divs (data-lg-state: input/loading/preview/full/error). Use data-testid selectors: lg-input, lg-sample-btn, lg-analyze-btn, lg-gate-email, lg-gate-submit, lg-tab-checklist, lg-reset-btn-2, lg-clause-card, lg-check-item. Frontend is static HTML at /app/frontend/public/index.html (React App.js returns null).
